# Caching.CacheableMethods property

The five method names whose results carry caching hints (§13.4, R-13.4-a). On every result from these methods a server MUST populate both `ttlMs` and `cacheScope`; on any other message receivers MUST ignore the fields if present (R-13.4-e). Mirrors TS `CACHEABLE_METHODS`.

```csharp
public static IReadOnlySet<string> CacheableMethods { get; }
```
